testsuite.name: JwtFilter (admin) - Tests del filtro JWT

testcase.name: token inválido: no lanza excepción y continúa sin autenticar
sin header Authorization: continúa la cadena sin autenticar

testsuite.system-out: 2026-05-29T00:37:17.697-05:00 WARN 26792 --- [sportshop-admin] [ Test worker] c.s.a.i.entry_points.JwtFilter : JWT inválido en admin: Invalid compact JWT string: Compact JWSs must contain exactly 2 period characters, and compact JWEs must contain exactly 4. Found: 0 2026-05-29T00:37:17.703-05:00 WARN 26792 --- [sportshop-admin] [ Test worker] c.s.a.i.entry_points.JwtFilter : JWT inválido en admin: Malformed protected header JSON: Unable to deserialize: Unexpected character ('�' (code 65533 / 0xfffd)): expected a valid value (JSON String, Number, Array, Object or token 'null', 'true' or 'false') at [Source: REDACTED (`StreamReadFeature.INCLUDE_SOURCE_IN_LOCATION` disabled); line: 1, column: 1]
